name: 30 V / 5 A Linear DC Regulated Power Supply with Output On/Off
tagline: 0–30 V, 0–5 A linear DC power supply — 4-digit LED display, Output On/Off pause function, CV/CC, short-circuit protection.
description: The Vartech 3005 B is a high-quality single-output transformer-based linear DC regulated power supply with a 0–30 V, 0–5 A output range. It features a 4-digit multicolour LED display for both voltage and current, automatic CV/CC mode switching, and a unique Output Pause function that allows live voltage adjustment while the output is switched off — so users can pre-set a voltage before connecting the load. Short-circuit and constant-current protection are built in. Suitable for bench-top laboratory, electronic service, and educational use.
features: 0–30 V, 0–5 A — single output, fully variable
Linear (transformer-based) — very stable and reliable
Automatic CV / CC mode switching
4-digit multicolour LED display for V and I
Output On/Off (pause) — live voltage adjustment with output off
Short-circuit and constant-current protection
Input: 220 V AC ±10 %, 50 Hz

specs.value: Yes — with live voltage control while output is off (pause function)

specs.label: Dimensions & Weight
specs.value: 125 W × 160 H × 260 D mm  |  Approx. 4 kg

name: 30 V / 10 A Heavy-Duty Linear DC Regulated Power Supply
tagline: 0–30 V, 0–10 A heavy-duty linear DC supply — 4-digit ammeter, CV/CC, Output On/Off, series/parallel capability.
description: The Vartech 3010 is a heavy-duty single-output transformer-based linear DC regulated power supply rated at 0–30 V, 0–10 A. It features a 4-digit ammeter LED display (3 digits for voltage), automatic CV/CC switching, output On/Off switch, and can be connected in series or parallel with another unit. Designed for demanding bench-top and industrial applications requiring stable, low-noise DC power.

CV/CC automatic switching, Output On/Off, and series/parallel connection capability make it suitable for high-current bench and industrial applications.

name: 30 V / 5 A Triple-Output Linear DC Regulated Power Supply (Dual + Fixed)
tagline: 3-channel linear DC supply — 0–30 V / 0–5 A × 2 (dual variable) + 5 V / 3 A fixed output, with 5-turn precision pot and 4 LED displays.
description: The Vartech 3005-3 D2 is a triple-output transformer-based linear DC regulated power supply with three independent channels: two fully variable 0–30 V / 0–5 A channels and one fixed 5 V / 3 A output. A 5-turn multiturn potentiometer provides precise voltage control on the variable channels. Outputs can be used independently, in series or in parallel. The unit features 4 LED DPMs, Output On/Off switch, and automatic CV/CC switching on the variable channels.

Preset voltage and current facility is included, along with Output On/Off switch. Designed for industrial and laboratory applications requiring multiple independent supply rails.

Outputs support independent, series and parallel modes (internally and externally), making it ideal for op-amp, bridge circuit and differential circuit testing. Features include preset voltage and current, Output On/Off, automatic CV/CC, auto series/parallel tracking, low ripple and noise, and reverse-polarity protection.

description: The Vartech 3005 S is a slim, lightweight SMPS-based DC regulated power supply rated at 0–30 V, 0–5 A (150 W). It uses post-stage voltage regulation technology for high efficiency (> 85 %) in a compact 73 × 140 × 205 mm, ~1 kg form factor. Features include adjustable OVP, OCP and OPP, panel lock, beeper alarm, output On/Off, coarse & fine voltage and current controls, and preset voltage/current when output is off.

name: 30 V / 5 A Programmable SMPS DC Power Supply
tagline: 0–30 V, 0–5 A programmable SMPS supply — 5 × 4-digit LED displays, USB interface, ModBus-RTU, 6 memories, list mode.
description: The Vartech PPS-3005 S is a programmable single-output SMPS DC power supply rated 0–30 V / 0–5 A. Five 4-digit multicolour LED displays show V set, I set, V out, I out and Watts simultaneously. A high-speed rotary dial, panel lock, beeper, 6 memory sets, list mode, output On/Off with programmable delay time (up to 9999 s), and USB PC interface with ModBus-RTU make it ideal for automated test sequences, R&D labs and educational use. Display resolution is 10 mV / 1 mA.

name: 30 V / 5 A Triple-Output Programmable Linear DC Power Supply
tagline: 3-channel programmable linear DC supply — 0–30 V / 0–5 A × 2 + 2.5/3.3/5 V fixed, USB interface, 4-memory sets, panel lock.
description: The Vartech PPS 3005-3 is a triple-output programmable linear DC power supply. Two main variable channels deliver 0–30 V / 0–5 A each, and one auxiliary channel provides selectable fixed output of 2.5 V, 3.3 V or 5 V at 3 A — covering all common digital logic supply rails. A USB PC interface (supports LabVIEW) enables remote control and automation. Features include 5-digit (V) + 4-digit (A) LED displays, 4 memory sets, panel lock, auto CV/CC, high resolution (100 mV / 10 mA) and comprehensive protection.
features: 3 independent output channels
Main Ch 1 & 2: 0–30 V, 0–5 A (fully variable)
Aux channel: 2.5 V / 3.3 V / 5 V selectable, 3 A fixed
USB PC interface — supports LabVIEW; ModBus-RTU (optional)
5-digit (V) + 4-digit (A) LED displays
4 memory sets  |  Panel lock  |  Output On/Off
Auto CV / CC  |  Save & Recall panel settings

name: 80 V / 5 A Auto-Ranging Programmable DC Power Supply (100 W)
tagline: 0–80 V / 0–5 A auto-ranging 100 W programmable supply — RS232/RS485 + SCPI/ModBus-RTU, remote sensing, list mode, slim design.
description: The Vartech PPSA-100W-8005 S is a next-generation slim auto-ranging programmable DC power supply with 100 W output. Auto-ranging allows wider combined voltage and current coverage than a conventional fixed-range supply — within the 100 W envelope the voltage and current limits automatically trade off, maximising the usable output range. Features include RS232 & RS485 standard interface (SCPI and ModBus-RTU), remote sensing (compensates up to 2 V lead drop), external trigger, list mode (100 groups × 4 memories), data recording software, 4-digit displays, and comprehensive protections (OVP, OCP, OTP). Resolution is 10 mV / 1 mA.
features: 0–80 V, 0–5 A max, 100 W — auto-ranging output
Slim design — 55 × 140 × 315 mm, 1.8 kg
RS232 & RS485 standard interface — SCPI and ModBus-RTU commands
Remote sensing — up to 2 V lead-drop compensation
List mode — 100 groups × 4 memories
External trigger via rear-panel 2-pin terminal
Data recording software included
OVP, OCP, OTP protections  |  Resolution: 10 mV / 1 mA

specs.label: Ripple & Noise (20 Hz–20 MHz)

specs.label: Rise Time
specs.value: Empty load ≤ 300 ms  |  Full load ≤ 300 ms

specs.value: Empty load ≤ 500 ms  |  Full load ≤ 200 ms
